title: various questions 15 years prophecy angel intentions etc
display_title: various questions 15 years prophecy angel intentions etc
wikitext:
[]: various questions: 15 years prophecy, angel intentions, etc             Quote Post by nomis1242 » Sat Dec 04, 2010 7:33 pm I've been rewatching the series and taking down notes of questions as I go through. Instead of making a new thread each time, I'll put them all together here a couple of questions at a time. All discussion welcome, please! 1) In Ep 1, there is a conversation between Gendo and Fuyutski something like "it's been 15 years", "yes, the angels are back". Does this mean that the Dead Sea Scrolls prophecized the angels would attack 15 years after second impact? If Nerv knew this, they seem a little unprepared (dragging Shinji in at the very last minute). 2) The Classified Information text says The Angels are all heading for Nerv H.Q. so that they can make contact with Lilith, the white giant in Terminal Dogma. They were aiming for Lilith from the start, not Adam.

[]: Re: various questions: 15 years prophecy, angel intentions,             Quote Post by skikes » Sat Dec 04, 2010 8:44 pm nomis1242 wrote: 1) In Ep 1, there is a conversation between Gendo and Fuyutski something like "it's been 15 years", "yes, the angels are back". Does this mean that the Dead Sea Scrolls prophecized the angels would attack 15 years after second impact? If Nerv knew this, they seem a little unprepared (dragging Shinji in at the very last minute).

[]: Re: various questions: 15 years prophecy, angel intentions,             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Dec 04, 2010 8:56 pm nomis1242 wrote: 1) In Ep 1, there is a conversation between Gendo and Fuyutski something like "it's been 15 years", "yes, the angels are back". Does this mean that the Dead Sea Scrolls prophecized the angels would attack 15 years after second impact? If Nerv knew this, they seem a little unprepared (dragging Shinji in at the very last minute).

[]:             Quote Post by Aozora » Sun Dec 05, 2010 1:32 pm Didn't Fuyutsuki say at one point that Third Impact was going to happen about 15 years after Second Impact at one point? In episode 21 maybe. It was going to happen no matter what, so the best they could do was try to get it to turn out for the best.

[]: Re: various questions: 15 years prophecy, angel intentions,             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Dec 05, 2010 2:40 pm nomis1242 wrote: Liliel (black hole angel),Arael (Asuka mindrape) and Armisael (bonded with Rei) seemed only interested in attacking the Eva/pilot

[]: Re: various questions: 15 years prophecy, angel intentions,             Quote Post by nomis1242 » Mon Dec 06, 2010 5:31 am Thanks for the replies. skikes wrote: If you met someone on the street you hadn't seen in quite some time and they said "It's good to see you, it's been 5 years" would think they had predicted your chance meeting?

[]: Re: various questions: 15 years prophecy, angel intentions,             Quote Post by TheLobe » Mon Dec 06, 2010 9:47 am Sachi wrote: There's a theory that the Angels can't tell the difference between Adam and Lilith. I personally just think the Angel's have their own objectives and do as they will.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Mon Dec 06, 2010 5:38 pm Leliel, Arael, Armisael, and Tabris are definitely interested in the Lilin.

[]:             Quote Post by Nightweaver20xx » Mon Dec 06, 2010 6:28 pm Angels, being an alternate form humans could have taken, are inherently curious about our species. Like young children, they are attempting to learn about us through admittedly brutally direct ways. Kids don't know any better because they don't have the experience with other people for proper social interaction. Angels don't, either, with their most successful attempt being Tabris (Kaworu). All that violence was just an attempt to communicate, through any means necessary.

[]:             Quote Post by nomis1242 » Mon Dec 06, 2010 6:38 pm Nightweaver20xx wrote: Angels, being an alternate form humans could have taken, are inherently curious about our species. Like young children, they are attempting to learn about us through admittedly brutally direct ways. Kids don't know any better because they don't have the experience with other people for proper social interaction. Angels don't, either, with their most successful attempt being Tabris (Kaworu). All that violence was just an attempt to communicate, through any means necessary.

[]:             Quote Post by Nightweaver20xx » Mon Dec 06, 2010 6:53 pm Yeah, they probably don't realize it. It's just a homing beacon for them, a natural, instinctive urge to reunite with ... wait, that's LILITH, so it wasn't their creator. So let me puzzle this one out a minute. Reunite with another of their kind? Lilith is the second Angel; she fell to Earth in the Black Moon AFTER Adam landed here. She then skewered Adam with the Lance in order to put him in stasis and keep him from producing offspring. SHE instead produced offspring in the form of Lilin -- humans. So... how do the Angels even exist at all, if they're supposed to be the offspring of Adam? Heh, what do you know, I just brought up more questions for myself than I solved.

[]:             Quote Post by nomis1242 » Mon Dec 06, 2010 7:58 pm Nightweaver20xx wrote: wait, that's LILITH, so it wasn't their creator. So let me puzzle this one out a minute.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Dec 07, 2010 5:06 pm Yeah, they probably don't realize it. It's just a homing beacon for them, a natural, instinctive urge to reunite with ... wait, that's LILITH, so it wasn't their creator. So let me puzzle this one out a minute.

[]: new topics             Quote Post by nomis1242 » Sun Dec 12, 2010 2:37 am I've got some thoughts on Ep 15, interested to hear your comments (feel free to keep discussing the earlier stuff though, I don't mean to put an end to those conversations) 3) It is strange that Gendo and Fuyutsuki talk, in private, about Marduk as a real separate organisation, not like it is just a dummy organisation of Nerv. Or maybe there was a "Marduk Instuture *wink, wink, nudge, nudge*" that got lost in translation? 4) Gendo reports that "Project Adam is going well", but Rei is "not so well" (from the context, it seems to be about a project related to Rei, not any empathy for Rei herself). What does Gendo mean?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 12, 2010 4:27 am I wonder how eager Shinji would be to kill Angels if he knew, "They're children...? JUST LIKE ME?!?!?" Nightweaver20xx wrote: She then skewered Adam with the Lance in order to put him in stasis and keep him from producing offspring.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Dec 12, 2010 1:07 pm CI seems to imply that Adam was skewered by her own Spear. Not as cool, I know.

[]:             Quote Post by nomis1242 » Sun Dec 12, 2010 6:04 pm AuraTwilight wrote: This is the sole and only reason anyone thinks the CI is non-canon.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Sun Dec 12, 2010 7:50 pm nomis1242 wrote: Really?? CI states that all angels are headed for Lilith, but this isn't true.

[]:             Quote Post by nomis1242 » Sun Dec 12, 2010 8:32 pm @thewayneiac: that is true, but here is what it says in the "Special Agency Nerv" section: D. In-Depth Information Nerv Headquarters was constructed inside the Black Moon containing Lilith. The Angels are all heading for Nerv H.Q. so that they can make contact with Lilith, the white giant in Terminal Dogma. They were aiming for Lilith from the start, not Adam.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Dec 13, 2010 4:10 pm Not necessarily. I think it's just a case of people reading too literally. Although all the Angels might have different outcomes, they all seem to possess the same drive. Going towards "Adam"/"Mommy! Mommy!" Going towards "Lilith-mistaken-as-Adam"/"Mommy! Mommy!" Going towards either or. Is one of the tards/"Duuuuuhr me smashes now!"
